title: fail_late_init clears lichen_iface violating set-once invariant
description: lichen_l2.c:478 — The invariant at line 82-85 states 'Set once, never cleared' because lora_rx_callback() reads without mutex. But fail_late_init sets lichen_iface = NULL. Race window: packet arrives between line 457 (set) and 478 (clear).
close_reason: Removed lichen_iface = NULL from fail_late_init; atomic flag is sufficient
